meta.project: ระบบการลา online

product_overview: A lightweight HR attendance and leave management web application that lets employees check in/out (GPS), request leave, and lets administrators manage employees, holidays, leave policies and approvals. Includes dashboards and reports for quick operational insight.
core_goals: Allow employees to record work attendance (check-in and check-out) with GPS verification and view their current attendance status
Enable employees to create and track leave requests (select type, date range, reason)
Provide supervisors with a queue to review, approve, or reject leave requests
Allow administrators to manage employee records, worksites/departments/positions/shifts, company holidays and leave policies
Expose an admin dashboard and reports so users can view summary statistics for attendance and leave
Allow users to edit their own profile and admins to configure LINE integration credentials

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users with email and password so they can access protected areas (dashboard, attendance, leave, settings).
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email with invalid format -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See validation error for email

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Show summary statistics and key metrics for attendance and leave so users can get a quick operational snapshot.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View attendance statistics cards -> View leave summary data

features.name: Employee Management
features.description: Browse, create, edit and remove employee records to maintain the organisation's staff data.
user_flows: Navigate to /employees -> View employee list with search and pagination
Navigate to /employees/create -> Fill employee form fields -> Submit employee form -> See new employee in list
Navigate to /employees -> Search and select employee -> Edit employee details -> Submit changes -> See updated details in list
Navigate to /employees -> Find employee -> Confirm delete action -> See employee removed from list

features.name: Attendance Check-In/Out
features.description: Let employees record their start and end of work with optional GPS permission to capture location at check-in/out.
user_flows: Navigate to /attendance/check-in-out -> Allow GPS location access -> Perform check-in -> View current attendance status showing checked-in
Navigate to /attendance/check-in-out -> Allow GPS location access -> Perform check-out -> View current attendance status showing checked-out
Navigate to /attendance/check-in-out -> Deny GPS location access -> See prompt requesting location permission

features.name: Leave Request Management
features.description: Create and track leave requests with type, date range and reason so employees can request time off and view request status.
user_flows: Navigate to /leave -> View leave request list
Navigate to /leave/create -> Select leave type -> Select date range -> Enter reason for leave -> Submit leave request -> See new leave request in list
Navigate to /leave/create -> Select leave type -> Leave date range empty -> Enter reason -> Submit leave request -> See validation error for date range

features.name: Leave Approvals
features.description: Provide supervisors with a queue to review pending leave requests and approve or reject them with notes.
user_flows: Navigate to /leave-approvals -> View pending leave requests -> Approve leave request -> See request moved to approved list
Navigate to /leave-approvals -> View pending leave requests -> Reject leave request with note -> See request marked as rejected

features.name: Company Holidays Settings
features.description: Manage company holidays by adding, editing and deleting holiday entries used in leave calculations and calendars.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings/holidays -> View list of company holidays
Navigate to /settings/holidays -> Initiate add holiday -> Fill date and name -> Submit to save holiday -> See new holiday in list
Navigate to /settings/holidays -> Select existing holiday -> Edit date or name -> Submit changes -> See updated holiday in list
Navigate to /settings/holidays -> Select existing holiday -> Confirm delete -> See holiday removed from list
Navigate to /settings/holidays -> Initiate add holiday -> Leave date empty -> Fill name -> Submit -> See validation error for date

features.name: LINE Integration Settings
features.description: Configure LINE Messaging API credentials (Channel Secret and Access Token) with masked display and reveal/copy controls for webhook usage.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings/line -> View masked Channel Secret and Access Token
Navigate to /settings/line -> Toggle show for Channel Secret and Access Token -> View revealed credential values
Navigate to /settings/line -> Edit Channel Secret value -> Edit Channel Access Token value -> Save LINE settings -> See masked values updated
Navigate to /settings/line -> Copy webhook URL -> Confirm webhook URL copied to clipboard

features.name: Leave Policy Settings
features.description: Define and manage leave types, quotas and related policies used when employees request time off.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings/leave -> View leave policy list
Navigate to /settings/leave -> Initiate add new leave policy -> Fill policy fields -> Submit to save policy -> See new policy in list
Navigate to /settings/leave -> Select policy -> Edit fields -> Submit changes -> See updated policy in list
Navigate to /settings/leave -> Select policy -> Confirm delete -> See policy removed from list

features.name: Profile Editing
features.description: Allow users to update their personal profile details so account information stays current.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Edit profile fields -> Submit profile changes -> See updated profile information
Navigate to /profile -> Enter invalid email format -> Submit profile changes -> See validation error for email

features.name: Reports and Analytics
features.description: Provide report views for leave and attendance so users can review historical data and trends.
user_flows: Navigate to /reports -> View leave and attendance reports
Navigate to /reports -> Apply filters to refine report -> See filtered report results

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: View summary statistics and key metrics for attendance and leave

Click create button to add new employee
Fill employee form fields (name, email, department, position, etc.)

Click edit to modify existing holiday

Toggle show/hide for each credential field

known_limitations.issue: Overtime and Assignment modules are stubbed out (routes commented)
known_limitations.impact: These features are not functional yet

known_limitations.issue: Server Docker container does not have npm installed
known_limitations.impact: Frontend must be pre-built locally and committed to git
